title: Only show columns in Formula that are currently visible in the view
excerpt: It would be nice to only see the columns related to the currently selected view when writing formulas. We have a LOT of columns in our Table, and certain views show certain columns - if we need to write a formula for the…

posts.author: bcarraway (Brandon Carraway)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be nice to only see the columns related to the currently selected view when writing formulas. We have a LOT of columns in our Table, and certain views show certain columns - if we need to write a formula for the view, then we have to scroll past potentially a very long list to find what we’re looking for. In this case, I have 4 columns visible, however, all of the columns are visible in the ‘Columns’ dropdown for the Formula.
